text_block_list.text:
One day, Symboli Rudolf invites me to sit in on
her dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's all for today. Did anything strike you as
requiring attention?

Symboli Rudolf's routine was so flawless, I can't
think of anything to bring up.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
May I assume from your silence that my
performance was acceptable?
choice_data_list: I'm sorry I can't be more helpful.
I'm sorry I can't be more helpful.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. If nothing stands out to the untrained
eye, then I have achieved the bare minimum at
least.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll devote a little more attention to this song,
however, as it still has room for improvement.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Setting that aside, there is something else I was
hoping to discuss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have been looking to broaden my range by
exploring new dance styles, but I am uncertain
where to begin.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If you have any ideas, please, don't hold back.
choice_data_list: How do you feel about breakdancing?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm. Cutesy, you say...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That would certainly be out of the norm for me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no time like the present. First, you
must tell me exactly what you consider "cutesy."

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So I must smile, wink, and stand pigeon-toed? Haha, there's more to this than I previously appreciated.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But that won't stop me from rising to the
challenge.

With that, Symboli Rudolf throws herself into
practicing all kinds of cutesy routines.

She seems satisfied that the effort has broadened
her horizons.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Breakdancing? That would certainly be a new
frontier...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's unlike anything I've attempted before, but
with it does come a certain freshness and freedom
of expression.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I could incorporate it into my routine, I think I
would improve dramatically.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no time like the present. I should get
started.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I can rely on your assistance, I hope?

And so Symboli Rudolf's horizons expand once
more, driven by an insatiable hunger for
self-improvement.
